projects.title: LoreBinder Project

doc-welcome.name: Welcome.md
doc-welcome.content:
# LoreBinder

Welcome to LoreBinder. Use the project toolbar to create multiple projects, assign a primary theme, and archive older work.

## Next Steps
- Update your shareable profile from the Profile button.
- Adjust interface font size and colours in Preferences.
- Build out your setting with docs, folders, and assets.
